Package org.eventb.internal.ui.proofpurger

Class ProofPurgerContentProvider

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.internal.ui.proofpurger.ProofPurgerContentProvider
All Implemented Interfaces:
org.eclipse.jface.viewers.IContentProvider, org.eclipse.jface.viewers.IStructuredContentProvider, org.eclipse.jface.viewers.ITreeContentProvider
public class ProofPurgerContentProvider extends Object implements org.eclipse.jface.viewers.ITreeContentProvider
Content provider for the proof purger.
